title: Calibration of a Density-based Model of Urban Morphogenesis
author: Juste Raimbault
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.repd3dn

steps.title: Morphological indicators are computed on spatial...
steps.instruction: Morphological indicators are computed on spatial windows using a parallelized R script.

steps.title: Using the NetLogo implementation, refine reasonable...
steps.instruction: Using the NetLogo implementation, refine reasonable parameter boundaries and validate visually both implementations.

steps.title: First exploration, 81 points in the...
steps.instruction: First exploration, 81 points in the parameter space with 100 repetitions each, to obtain convergence properties of indicators.

steps.title: LHS exploration of model parameter space
steps.instruction: LHS exploration of model parameter space.

steps.title: Compare real morphological indicators with the...
steps.instruction: Compare real morphological indicators with the one produced during the exploration of the model, projected in a 2D principal plane.
